data.title: Mark Cuban Says New Satoshi Nakamoto Documentary That Claims To have 'Cracked The Case' About Bitcoin Creator 'Makes You Think'
data.description: Entrepreneur Mark Cuban expressed admiration for a new documentary unveiling the true identity of Bitcoin's enigmatic founder, Satoshi Nakamoto. Cuban described the film, titled "Finding Satoshi: The Search Ends Here," as "really good" and "entertaining," noting its potential to stimulate critical thinking. The documentary, led by journalist William D. Cohan and investigator Tyler Maroney, presents an evidence-based exploration into one of the most significant enigmas in the cryptocurrency realm. Featuring insights from early adopters and industry figures like Michael Saylor of Strategy Inc. and security expert Jameson Lopp, the documentary is receiving positive reviews. Cuban's review was shared in an X post, available for further details on the story.

data.title: Elon Musk's Tesla Retains Bitcoin Holdings in Q1 Amid $222 Million Digital Assets Losses On Paper
data.description: Electric vehicle company Tesla Inc. (NASDAQ: TSLA) has decided to keep its holdings of Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) throughout the first quarter despite the bear market conditions. However, the company reported a notable decrease in the value of its digital assets, which were valued at $786 million as of March 31, marking a 22% decline from the fourth quarter of 2025. This resulted in Tesla experiencing paper losses of $222 million on its cryptocurrency holdings, marking consecutive quarters of losses. Although Tesla does not disclose the specific breakdown of its cryptocurrency investments, analytics firm Arkham Intelligence confirmed that Tesla's Bitcoin holdings stood at 11,509 BTC and remained unchanged.

data.title: Gary Black Says Tesla's $25 Billion Spend Not A Surprise, Expects TSLA Valuation To Come Down Amid Self-Driving Roll Back
data.description: Investor Gary Black from The Future Fund LLC has predicted a decline in the value of Tesla Inc. (NASDAQ: TSLA) in the near future due to a slowdown in its self-driving technology progress. Black mentioned on social media that he anticipates the full-year 2026 earnings for Tesla to be adjusted upward to around $2.00 per share from the previous estimate of $1.90 per share. Despite the positive earnings outlook, Black warned that Tesla's valuation may decrease. He stated that the automaker's 2026 P/E ratio is expected to drop from its current value of 204x as investors react to delays in the rollout of unsupervised FSD and Robotaxi technologies, now pushed to late 2026 or potentially next year. data.title: HEINEKEN N.V. 2026 FIRST QUARTER TRADING UPDATE
data.description: In Amsterdam on April 23, 2026, HEINEKEN N.V. released its 2026 FIRST QUARTER TRADING UPDATE, reporting a strong start to the year with significant volume growth. According to IFRS Measures, total volume saw a 2.8% increase, reaching 66.4 million euros. Organic growth in total volume stood at 1.2%. Revenue also saw a positive trend, growing by 1.4% to 7,892 million euros. When considering BEIA Measures, revenue reached 7,888 million euros. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Pharming Group to report first quarter 2026 financial results and provide business update on May 7
data.description: Pharming will announce its financial results for the first quarter of 2026 and offer a business update on May 7, 2026. They will also conduct a conference call at 13:30 CEST/07:30 EDT on the same day.

data.title: NORBIT ASA – Notice of Annual General Meeting on 20 May 2026
data.description: The Annual General Meeting of NORBIT ASA in Trondheim is scheduled for May 20, 2026, at 4:00 pm CET and will be held digitally without physical attendance. Shareholders can find details on how to participate on the company's website and in the provided notice. Shareholders unable to attend are urged to vote early or submit a proxy form before the meeting.

data.title: PrecisionBiotics® (Novonesis) and Biocodex Mark Next Phase of Strategic Partnership with New Agreement
data.description: In Copenhagen, Denmark on April 23, 2026, PrecisionBiotics®, a division of Novonesis, and Biocodex solidified their partnership with the signing of a new agreement. This move is aimed at enhancing collaboration between the two companies following a strategic leadership meeting. This agreement marks the beginning of the next phase of their partnership.

data.description: Unveiled at EuroCucina in Milan, Fisher & Paykel, the luxury appliance brand from Aotearoa New Zealand within the Haier Group global portfolio, presented Nature—Ritual, a 450m² immersive installation showcasing the State of the Art Collection.

data.title: Nel ASA: Receives a USD 7 million purchase order for PEM equipment to be deployed in the US
data.description: In Oslo, Norway, on April 23, 2026, Nel Hydrogen US, a branch of Nel ASA, announced the reception of a purchase order totaling approximately USD 7 million for PEM electrolyser equipment. This equipment is intended for the production of hydrogen at a public utility.
